[the] number of weeks until the new album release is defined by the polynomial equation 3x² - 4x - 5 = 0, solve for x to find the possible number of weeks until the release.

[the] fan wants to calculate the total number of times they will have listened to the previous album by then. if y represents the total number of listens, express y as a function of x and evaluate y using the smallest positive value of x obtained from the first sub-problem.
